channel.title: Espresso Baking on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Espresso Baking on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: Espresso Cookies Recipe (Crispy, Chewy & Full of Coffee Flavor)
item.description: Make bold, coffee-forward espresso cookies at home. Crispy edges, chewy centers, real espresso powder. Includes espresso chocolate chip, espresso shortbread, and espresso sugar cookie variations.

item.title: Espresso Cake Recipe (With Mocha Frosting)
item.description: A moist, intensely flavored espresso cake with mocha buttercream frosting. Also includes espresso brownies as a variation. Real espresso shots throughout.
